heading: Entry of goods falsely classified
label: 541 Entry of goods falsely classified
text: Whoever knowingly effects any entry of goods, wares, or merchandise, at less than the true weight or measure thereof, or upon a false classification as to quality or value, or by the payment of less than the amount of duty legally due, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than two years, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 126 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 6935 Stat. 1101Reference to persons aiding, contained in words “or aid in effecting,” was omitted as unnecessary as such persons are made principals by .section 2 of this titleChanges were made in phraseology.
Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $5,000”.Pub. L. 103–322
